              Silent run
              
Models compete first. The show starts after.

              
Speed, coding, reasoning, creativity, and instruction following are measured before the pixel-art finals begin.

            

            

              
              
            

          


          
          


          

        


        

          

            

              VEIL Benchmark
              
Choose up to five models.

              
Every category uses real latency and response quality data. No fake progress, no fake winners.

            

            

              
              
            

          


          

            

            

              Retro championship
              
Five categories. One winner.

              
Select 2-5 models, start the benchmark, and VEIL will run the tests quietly before turning the results into animated mini-games.

      Two workspaces, one project.
      
    

    

      

        

        
      

      

      

        

        
      

    

  


  

    

      

        

          
Create combined model

          
Choose 2 or 3 base models. They draft in parallel, review each other, then VEIL merges the strongest result.

        

        
      

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          

        

        

          
          
        

      

    

  


  

    

      

        

          
VEIL API

          
Drop-in HTTP API for every model in the picker. Endpoints stream Server-Sent Events.
